sentences.arabic: إِنَّ بِرَّ الْوَالِدَيْنِ مِنْ أَعْظَمِ الْقُرُبَاتِ الَّتِي تَقُودُ إِلَى رِضَا الرَّحْمَنِ وَدُخُولِ الْجِنَانِ، وَقَدْ أَوْصَى الشَّرْعُ الْمُطَهَّرُ بِالْإِحْسَانِ إِلَيْهِمَا فِي جَمِيعِ الْأَحْوَالِ.
sentences.translation: Dobročinstvo prema roditeljima spada u najveća djela koja vode ka zadovoljstvu Milostivog i ulasku u džennete, a čisti Šerijat je preporučio dobročinstvo prema njima u svim prilikama.
sentences.translationEn: Filial piety (Birr al-Walidayn) is among the greatest acts of worship that lead to the pleasure of the Most Merciful and entry into Paradise, and the purified Sharia has commanded excellence toward them in all circumstances.

sentences.arabic: عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُ قَالَ: جَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ فَقَالَ: يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ، مَنْ أَحَقُّ النَّاسِ بِحُسْنِ صَحَابَتِي؟
sentences.translation: Od Ebu Hurejre, radijallahu anhu, prenosi se da je rekao: 'Došao je neki čovjek Allahovom Poslaniku, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, i upitao: O Allahov Poslaniče, ko je najpreči mom lijepom ophuđenju?
sentences.translationEn: On the authority of Abu Hurayrah, may Allah be pleased with him, who said: A man came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, who among people is most deserving of my good companionship?' He said: 'Your mother.' He said: 'Then who?' He said: 'Then your mother.' He said: 'Then who?' He said: 'Then your mother.' He said: 'Then who?' He said: 'Then your father' [Reported by al-Bukhari in the Book of Manners, No. 5971].
Sheikh Ibn Baz, may Allah have mercy on him, explains this hadith, clarifying that mentioning the mother three times indicates that she has three times the right to piety and care as the father.
This piety is manifested in lowering the wing of humility to them, being gentle in addressing them, and avoiding everything that might hurt their feelings, even with a minor word.
Furthermore, piety is not cut off by their death, but continues through praying for them, giving charity on their behalf, and fulfilling their pledges.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ: «ثُمَّ أَبُوكَ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ، رَقْم ٥٩٧١].
sentences.translationEn: The knowledgeable Muslim is the one who realizes that obedience to parents in matters that do not involve disobedience to Allah is an open gate among the gates of Paradise, and that undutifulness (uquq) is one of the major sins that necessitate Allah's loathing and punishment in this world and the Hereafter.

sentences.arabic: وَيَشْرَحُ الشَّيْخُ ابْنُ بَازٍ رَحِمَهُ اللهُ هَذَا الْحَدِيثَ مُبَيِّنًا أَنَّ تَكْرَارَ الْأُمِّ ثَلَاثًا يَدُلُّ عَلَى أَنَّ لَهَا ثَلَاثَةَ أَمْثَالِ مَا لِلْأَبِ مِنَ الْبِرِّ وَالرِّعَايَةِ.
sentences.translationEn: The knowledgeable Muslim is the one who realizes that obedience to parents in matters that do not involve disobedience to Allah is an open gate among the gates of Paradise, and that undutifulness (uquq) is one of the major sins that necessitate Allah's loathing and punishment in this world and the Hereafter.

sentences.arabic: وَيَتَجَلَّى هَذَا الْبِرُّ فِي خَفْضِ جَنَاحِ الذُّلِّ لَهُمَا وَالتَّلَطُّفِ فِي مُخَاطَبَتِهِمَا، وَتَجَنُّبِ كُلِّ مَا قَدْ يُؤْذِي مَشَاعِرَهُمَا وَلَوْ بِكَلِمَةٍ يَسِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translationEn: The knowledgeable Muslim is the one who realizes that obedience to parents in matters that do not involve disobedience to Allah is an open gate among the gates of Paradise, and that undutifulness (uquq) is one of the major sins that necessitate Allah's loathing and punishment in this world and the Hereafter.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا أَنَّ الْبِرَّ لَا يَنْقَطِعُ بِمَوْتِهِمَا، بَلْ يَسْتَمِرُّ عَنْ طَرِيقِ الدُّعَاءِ لَهُمَا وَالصَّدَقَةِ عَنْهُمَا وَإِنْفَاذِ عُهُودِهِمَا.
sentences.translation: Rekao je: Zatim tvoj otac' [Buhari, Knjiga o adabu, br. 5971].
sentences.translationEn: The knowledgeable Muslim is the one who realizes that obedience to parents in matters that do not involve disobedience to Allah is an open gate among the gates of Paradise, and that undutifulness (uquq) is one of the major sins that necessitate Allah's loathing and punishment in this world and the Hereafter.

sentences.arabic: فَالْمُسْلِمُ الْفَقِيهُ هُوَ مَنْ يُدْرِكُ أَنَّ طَاعَةَ الْوَالِدَيْنِ فِي غَيْرِ مَعْصِيَةِ اللهِ هِيَ بَابٌ مَفْتُوحٌ مِن أَبْوَابِ الْجَنَّةِ، وَأَنَّ الْعُقُوقَ مِنَ الْكَبَائِرِ الَّتِي تُوجِبُ مَقْتَ اللهِ وَعُقُوبَتَهُ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Šejh Ibn Baz, Allah mu se smilovao, objašnjava ovaj hadis pojašnjavajući da trostruko spominjanje majke ukazuje na to da ona ima tri puta više prava na dobročinstvo i brigu nego otac. Ovo dobročinstvo se ogleda u poniznosti prema njima, ljubaznosti u obraćanju i izbjegavanju svega što bi moglo povrijediti njihova osjećanja, makar to bila i neznatna riječ. Također, dobročinstvo ne prestaje njihovom smrću, već se nastavlja putem dove za njih, udjeljivanja sadake u njihovo ime i ispunjavanja njihovih oporuka. Učeni musliman je onaj koji shvata da je pokornost roditeljima u onome što nije grijeh prema Allahu otvorena kapija dženneta, a da je neposlušnost jedan od velikih grijeha koji uzrokuju Allahovu srdžbu i kaznu na dunjaluku i ahiretu.
sentences.translationEn: The knowledgeable Muslim is the one who realizes that obedience to parents in matters that do not involve disobedience to Allah is an open gate among the gates of Paradise, and that undutifulness (uquq) is one of the major sins that necessitate Allah's loathing and punishment in this world and the Hereafter.
